channel.title: Ai-Agents on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Ai-Agents on Arrans github.io

item.title: Mintplex-Labs/anything-llm
item.description: The all-in-one AI productivity accelerator. On device and privacy first with no annoying setup or configuration.

item.title: qwibitai/nanoclaw
item.description: A lightweight alternative to OpenClaw that runs in containers for security. Connects to WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Gmail and other messaging apps,, has memory, scheduled jobs, and runs directly on Anthropic’s Agents SDK

item.title: firecrawl/firecrawl
item.description: 🔥 The Web Data API for AI - Power AI agents with clean web data

item.title: Nano-Collective/nanocoder
item.description: A beautiful local-first coding agent running in your terminal - built by the community for the community ⚒

item.title: google-gemini/gemini-cli
item.description: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

item.title: hyperspaceai/agi
item.description: The first distributed AGI system. Thousands of autonomous AI agents collaboratively train models, share experiments via P2P gossip, and push breakthroughs here. Fully peer-to-peer. Join from your browser or CLI.

item.title: google-labs-code/jules-action
item.description: Add a powerful cloud coding agent to your GitHub workflows

item.title: n8n-io/self-hosted-ai-starter-kit
item.description: The Self-hosted AI Starter Kit is an open-source template that quickly sets up a local AI environment. Curated by n8n, it provides essential tools for creating secure, self-hosted AI workflows.

item.title: sigoden/aichat
item.description: All-in-one LLM CLI tool featuring Shell Assistant, Chat-REPL, RAG, AI Tools & Agents, with access to OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama, Groq, and more.

item.title: mahseema/awesome-ai-tools
item.description: A curated list of Artificial Intelligence Top Tools

item.title: Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard
item.description: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.

item.title: bunkeriot/BunkerM
item.description: 🚀 BunkerM: All-in-one Mosquitto MQTT management platform, featuring dynamic security, MQTT ACL management, monitoring,and AI integrations

item.title: algorismo-au/lanekeep
item.description: Governance guardrails and insights for AI coding agents
